era.zh: 北宋庆历年间（1041至1048年）毕昇活字；元代1298年王祯木活字与转轮排字盘
era.en: Bi Sheng's movable type in 1041–48; Wang Zhen's wooden type and revolving typecase in 1298

oneLiner.zh: 让字盘转到人面前，而不是让人走遍字架。
oneLiner.en: Bring the type to the person instead of making the person walk the racks.

principle.zh: 毕昇用标准化胶泥活字、松脂蜡固定和双铁板流水作业印刷；王祯按韵分类，把活字排在可旋转的双面大轮上，使坐着的排字工左右取字。
principle.en: Bi Sheng combined standardized clay type, resin-wax fixing, and a two-plate workflow; Wang Zhen indexed wooden type by rhyme on two-sided revolving wheels so a seated compositor could retrieve characters from either side.

sources.quote: 慶曆中，有布衣畢昇，又為活版。其法用膠泥刻字，薄如錢唇，每字為一印，火燒令堅。先設一鐵版，其上以松脂臘和紙灰之類冒之。欲印則以一鐵範置鐵板上，乃密布字印。滿鐵範為一板，持就火煬之，藥稍鎔，則以一平板按其面，則字平如砥……常作二鐵板，一板印刷，一板已自布字……每一字皆有數印，如之、也等字，每字有二十餘印……不若燔土，用訖再火令藥鎔，以手拂之，其印自落，殊不沾汙。

translation.zh: 庆历年间，平民毕昇发明活版。他用胶泥刻字，烧硬后在铺有松脂、蜡和纸灰的铁板中排字，加热使黏料熔化，再用平板压平。两块铁板交替排字和印刷，常用字备有二十多个字模；用完再加热，字模即可脱落。
translation.en: During the Qingli era, the commoner Bi Sheng made movable type from clay, fired each character hard, arranged the type in an iron frame over resin, wax, and paper ash, heated it, and pressed it flat. Two iron plates alternated between typesetting and printing, common characters had more than twenty copies, and reheating released the type cleanly.

sources.chapter: 卷二十二·造活字印書法
sources.quote: 用輕木造為大輪，其輪盤徑可七尺，輪軸高可三尺許……立轉輪盤，以圓竹笆鋪之，上置活字板面，各依號數……凡置輪兩面，一輪置監韻板面，一輪置雜字板面。一人中坐，左右俱可推轉摘字。蓋以人尋字則難，以字就人則易。此轉輪之法，不勞力而坐致。

translation.zh: 用轻木做直径约七尺的大轮，轮轴高约三尺。轮面铺竹笆，按编号放活字板；两面各设一轮，一轮放韵类字，一轮放杂字。一人坐在中间，左右都能转轮取字。人找字难，让字来到人面前就容易。
translation.en: A light-wood wheel about seven chi across turns on an axle about three chi high. Bamboo mats carry numbered type boards; one wheel holds rhyme categories and the other miscellaneous characters. A compositor sits between them and turns either wheel, bringing type to the person instead of searching the racks.

sources.quote: 試印本縣誌書，約計六萬餘字，不一月而百部齊成。

translation.zh: 试印本县县志，约六万多字，不到一个月就完成一百部。
translation.en: A trial printing of the county gazetteer, more than sixty thousand characters, produced one hundred copies in under a month.

dimensions.basis: 原文是比喻，2至3毫米为推测
一轮放韵类字，一轮放杂字；数量以count理解

detail.zh: 翟金生保存的清代印本与现代烧制实验反驳了胶泥活字不可行的怀疑。
detail.en: Zhai Jinsheng's surviving Qing prints and modern firing experiments counter doubts about clay type's feasibility.

topic.en: Attribution of the Bi Sheng tombstone

detail.zh: 1990年英山发现的“毕昇”墓碑是否属于发明者仍有争议。
detail.en: The attribution of the 'Bi Sheng' tombstone found at Yingshan in 1990 remains disputed.

detail.zh: 韩国《直指》（1377年）是现存最早的金属活字书，但毕昇的发明早约三百年。
detail.en: Korea's Jikji of 1377 is the earliest surviving metal-type book, while Bi Sheng's invention predates it by roughly three centuries.

exhibit.zh: 毕昇工艺复原与转轮排字场景
exhibit.en: Bi Sheng process reconstruction and revolving-typecase scene

name.zh: 东源木活字印刷展示馆

exhibit.zh: 仍在使用的木活字工艺，2010年列入联合国教科文组织名录
exhibit.en: Living wooden movable-type practice, UNESCO-listed in 2010

hook.zh: “以字就人，不劳力而坐致”：转的是字盘，不是人，取字从走遍货架变成旋转索引。
hook.en: Bring type to the person without labor: the case rotates, not the compositor, changing retrieval from walking racks to spinning an index.

demo.zh: 点一个目标字，转轮自动把对应扇区送到手边，同时用计时条与“走遍字架”动画竞速。
demo.en: Tap a target character, rotate its sector into reach, and race a stopwatch against a walk-the-racks animation.

echo.zh: 它像自动仓库的旋转料架，也是一种实体数据库索引。
echo.en: It echoes carousel storage in automated warehouses and acts as a physical database index.
